tests.name: example is not evidence
tests.expected: Example packet uses ROADMAP_NOT_CONFIGURED, NOT_CONFIGURED, TODO, and false timing/signoff values rather than real demo identifiers.

tests.name: example keeps timing false
tests.expected: Example packet keeps three_minute_timing_pass false and every rehearsal row pass false.

tests.name: example preserves roadmap downgrades
tests.expected: Browser extension, CLI install, generated CI, readiness checks 5-12, and legal/platform findings remain ROADMAP or STATIC_REVIEW_INDICATOR.

tests.name: example is schema-shaped only
tests.expected: Example packet is provided as a structural placeholder and must be replaced or filled by the integration owner before use.
